target: 9. The Island's Hero
(Anyway, I need to be careful... and somehow buy time...)
(I need to think of a way to break out of this situation.)
Have you made up your mind?
Ugh…!
So you're determined to... finish us off here, huh.
It's your own fault, Shin-chan. Because you stuck your nose where it didn't belong.
Where it didn't belong...!
H-Hey... what the hell are you guys!? How many of you are there!?
Are you planning to kill everyone on the island and take their places!?
Shut up. I don't need to tell you that.
Like I'd let you...
Like I'd let you do that, you punk!!!
Totsumura-san…!?
I'm a hero of justice! I won't let you guys do whatever you want!
I'm the local cop on this island! I'll protect the peace of Hitogashima!
No matter what kind of monster I'm up against! A hero of justice will never lose!!!
What…!?
(It looked like the bullets hit, but...)
(I ducked instinctively, so I don't really know what happened...!)
(What happened to them... What happened to the Shadows!?)
*Pant*... *pant*... *pant*...
I did it... I did it, Shinpei-kun!
I beat the fake...! The real me defeated my fake!
Totsumura-san…
(It looked like one shot hit him... but the other just grazed the Shadow's leg...)
(I don't see Shadow Totsumura around... Could he have actually defeated him?)
(Even though Shadow Mio was completely unfazed even after getting hit by a bullet...)
What are you doing, Tetsu-san. You really are an idiot.
P-Put your hands up! Mio-cha... no, fake Mio-chan, if you don't want to end up like this...!
Hurry up and surrender!
*Sigh*, this is the worst. My plans are completely ruined.
How long are you gonna act so smug! I-I'm serious!
I'll shoot you for real! Y-You're okay with that, right!?
Those rumors about us that you spread, Tetsu-san. To make that story go away, we needed you to go around explaining it yourself.
Hey, Tetsu-san. Instead of Shadow Tetsu-san, could you go around saying 'that was a lie'?
Are you an idiot!? Like hell I'd say that!

I see.
Well, it's fine.
If someone is inconvenient alive, we just have to kill them.
Tetsu-san, Shin-chan, the people who found out about us, and the mainland detectives coming first thing in the morning.
We'll just kill every last one of them. Then there won't be any problems.
Y-You're gonna massacre everyone!?
Is this... retaliation for me killing that fake!?
I guess so. You just created more unnecessary work for us.
We were supposed to just have to take care of the detectives coming from the mainland.
E-Even so...!
That's... because of me, everyone on the island... You're lying...
Totsumura-san! Pull yourself together! It's too early to give up!
Eh…?
This one...! If we just defeat this Shadow that looks exactly like Mio right here and now, it'll be fine!
If we do that, there won't be any more casualties! We can save everyone!
That's some enthusiasm. But how are you planning to kill me?
Earlier it was the chest, right. Where are you going to shoot next?
S-Shinpei-kun...
(It's true that shooting the chest didn't work on Shadow Mio.)
(But for some reason, we were able to defeat Shadow Totsumura...)
(Look at it objectively...! There has to be a weakness... if we can just aim for that!)
Totsumura-san! Where did those two shots from earlier hit the Shadow!?
E-Erm... One missed low and hit the ground, but...
The other one definitely hit him in the head!
(The head... right, the head.)
How many bullets are left!?
E-Erm...! The New Nambu holds five rounds, and I've already fired four, so――
Just one left... huh.
Totsumura-san, I'll put my body on the line to hold her down.
In the meantime, please shoot her accurately in the head. The Shadow's weakness is... probably the head!
O-Oh...
Wait, hold on a sec! What happens if I mess up!?
A headshot, that's not something you can just easily pull off!?
Please... you have to manage it somehow! This is the decisive moment!
Are you done talking? I think I gave you plenty of time.
A-Ah...
S-Shinpei-kun. That plan from earlier... I can't do it.
Instead of you, Shinpei-kun, I'll go!
Putting your body on the line against a monster like that... Something that dangerous is the elder's job!
T-Totsumura-san...
Is it less because you're the elder... and more because you're the island's hero?
Hahaha... Well, something like that.
Alright, I'm counting on you. I'm leaving this... to you.
(A real gun... this is my first time holding one. It's much heavier than I thought.)
(Now, with this, I'm going to...)
Well then, it's about time――
I won't let you! Uwoooooohhh!!
(Totsumura-san went...!)
(Then I have to...!)
How's that, I caught you!
What's this, Tetsu-san? Hugging my leg, that's sexual harassment.
Hurry! Hurry and shoot, Shinpei-kun!!
Right...!!
(Damn it, but Shadow Mio is moving...!)
This is getting annoying.
Guh!
Totsumura-san!
It's unpleasant. Can you let go already?
Guh, gah...!
(Why, why can she stab a person so calmly...)
(What the hell are the Shadows...)
S-S-Shinpei-kun...
Hurry... hurry...
Daaaaaamn it!!!
D-Did I do it...!?
...Ugh.
Totsumura-san!!
Guh...! Shinpei-kun... it went... well, right?
Y-Yes...
I'm fine... A hero of justice... won't die from something like this...
Totsumura-san…
Say... Shinpei-kun... Did I... manage to protect everyone on the island...?
Yes, I think you protected them...
Erika... chan... I wonder if she'll praise me.
She will definitely praise you! So... so... hang in there...
...Tell... Erika-chan.
That Tetsu Totsumura... did his best for the island... until the very end...
Please tell her that yourself!
I'd like to, but... it doesn't look like I can...
Totsumura-san!
I'm counting on you... Shinpei, ku――
Totsumura-san...? Totsumura-san!!
Totsumura-saaaaaaaan!!
It's useless to shout so loud.
Can't you tell by looking? That person is already dead.
Y-You...!
(She... she's still alive!?)
(The head... wasn't the Shadow's weakness!?)
Too bad, Shin-chan. There was a proper hint, though.
(W-What does that mean...?)
Well, this is the end. Give up for real this time, okay?
...I understand.
(Even if I'm killed... If things go well, I should be able to go back in time and try again.)
(In that case――)
I'll give up this time. Make it quick.
That's a good attitude. Here I go.
Yeah… yeah…
Eh, I can't kill him? Yeah, yeah...
(Who is she talking to...?)
Who are you talking to? Aren't you going to kill me?
Yeah, I've been told I can't kill you.
Shin-chan, even if you die, you go back in time and come back to life?
(Why... does she know about that...)
So there's no punishment for you, Shin-chan.
(Something... isn't there something!? Something that could possibly kill her...)
(Perfect! The kitchen knife she dropped earlier is...!)
U... Uwoooooohhh!!
Are you satisfied?
(The wound from stabbing her so deeply with the knife... It's already gone...!?)
Caught you...!
S-Stop! Let go...!
Jeez, don't struggle so much. No matter how much you resist, it's useless.
What are you going to do with me?
I'm taking you to Mother's.
(Mother...?)
You have to stay alive forever at Mother's place, Shin-chan.
Alright, let's go, Shin-chan.
Hey, tell me just one thing.
What?
How... do we kill you guys?
How to kill us?
That's obvious, isn't it?
It's a secret, even from you, Shin-chan.
Key TIPS [<color=#GF_KEY_ROOTCLEAR_TET>route: Tetsu Totsumura</color>] obtained.
